chapter.label: Tale 47
chapter.title: A miracle of the holy mother of GoD

paragraphs.text: AGAINST GAIANAS THE ACTOR WHO WAS Anastasios, priest and treasurer at the holy <Church of the> HBLASPHEMING HER IN THE THEATRE Resurrection of Christ our God told us that Cosmiana, the wife of Germanos the Patrician, came one night, wishing to worship alone [Heliopolis] is a city of Lebanese Phoenicia. There was an actor at the holy and life-giving sepulchre of our Lord Jesus Christ, the there named Gaianas who used to perform at the theatre an act in true God. When she approached the sanctuary, our Lady the holy which be blasphemed against the holy Mother of God. The Mother Mother of God, together with other women, met her in visible form, of God appeared to him saying: ‘What evil have I done to you that and said to her: ‘As you are not one of us, you are not to come in you should revile me before so many people and blaspheme against here, for you are none of ours’. The woman was in fact a member me? He rose up and, far from mending his ways, proceeded to of the sect of Severus Acephalos.” She begged hard for permission blaspheme against ber even more than before. Three times she to enter but the holy Mother of God replied: ‘Believe me, woman, appeared to him with the same reproach aad admonition.
